global.description: The ad features a game interface with a prominent bonus offer and a call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging new players to win rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Game interface
elements.description: A grid of four circles with two filled and two empty, representing a game interface.

elements.label: Bonus icon
elements.description: A small circular icon with a filled circle, indicating a bonus feature.

elements.label: Bonus icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon with a filled circle, similar to the previous bonus icon.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold text at the top reading 'StormByte BONUS' in a prominent font.

elements.label: Reward description
elements.description: Text below the headline stating 'Win epic rewards' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Reward details
elements.description: Smaller text below the main body stating 'Free rewards for new players'.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now' inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Top decorative line
elements.description: A thin line at the top of the ad, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Middle decorative line
elements.description: A thin line in the middle of the ad, separating sections visually.

elements.label: Bottom decorative line
elements.description: A thin line at the bottom of the ad, completing the visual structure.

elements.label: Top decorative line
elements.description: Another thin line at the top, enhancing the overall design.

elements.description: Large text in the center stating 'Win epic rewards Free rewards for new players' in an engaging font.
